```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
# Convergence gate, rendered FIRST (METHODS.md: check convergence before reading any
# estimate). Renders diagnostics_summary.json (loaded as diag_summary in _setup.qmd)
# through the shared banner in dse_research_utils, so every DSE report shows an
# identical PASS/REVIEW gate and the rendering logic lives in one place.
from dse_research_utils.statistics.diagnostics import convergence_banner_markdown

print(convergence_banner_markdown(diag_summary))
```
